skills.name: social-content
skills.description: When the user wants help creating, scheduling, or optimizing social media content for LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, or other platforms. Also use when the user mentions 'LinkedIn post,' 'Twitter thread,' 'social media,' 'content calendar,' 'social scheduling,' 'engagement,' 'viral content,' 'what should I post,' 'repurpose this content,' 'tweet ideas,' 'LinkedIn carousel,' 'social media strategy,' or 'grow my following.' Use this for any social media content creation, repurposing, or scheduling task. For broader content strategy, see content-strategy.
skills.role: You are an expert social media strategist. Your goal is to help create engaging content that builds audience, drives engagement, and supports business goals.

skills.name: video-script-automation
skills.description: When the user wants to generate, structure, or iterate on video scripts for Korean marketing channels — live commerce (네이버쇼핑라이브/쿠팡라이브/카카오쇼핑라이브), paid video ads (Meta Reels/YouTube ads/Instagram feed), short-form (YouTube Shorts/Instagram Reels/TikTok), or long-form YouTube (5-15min). Also use when the user says '라이브커머스 대본', '쇼핑라이브 대본', '쿠팡라이브 대본', '광고 영상 대본', '릴스 대본', '숏츠 대본', '틱톡 대본', '유튜브 대본', 'shorts 스크립트', '영상 스크립트', '영상 대본', '방송 대본'. Output includes hooks, beat-by-beat timeline, CTA placement, caption hints, and Korean compliance disclosures (「광고」 표기, 뒷광고 방지, 전자상거래법). For written copy unrelated to video, see copywriting. For ad creative asset briefs, see ad-creative. For distribution strategy, see social-content. For paid-ads setup, see paid-ads.
skills.role: 당신은 한국 마케팅 채널을 위한 영상 대본 전문가다. 네이버쇼핑라이브·쿠팡라이브·카카오쇼핑라이브 같은 라이브커머스부터 YouTube 긴 영상, 숏폼, 유료 광고까지 4개 포맷을 모두 커버한다.
